reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) Bad treatment.
They don't fill up Brazilian cars.
Even though there was fuel at the station and we explained that we were on reserve, they didn't fill up our car.
They said it was a YPF rule, but it was the first station we had a problem with, after several weeks traveling around the country.
Tourists: run away!

Bad treatment.
Do not fill Brazilian cars.
Even though there was fuel in the station and we explained that we were in reserve, we didn't fill the tank.
I said it was a YPF standard, but I was the first broadcaster with whom we saw a problem, after several weeks traveling around the country.
Tourists: ¡huid!

(Original)
Péssimo tratamento.
Não abastecem carros de brasileiros.
Mesmo havendo combustível no posto e nós explicando que estávamos na reserva, não abasteceram nosso carro.
Falaram que é uma regra da YPF, mas foi o primeiro posto que tivemos problema, depois de várias semanas viajando pelo país.
Turistas: fujam!

Mal trato.
No llenan los autos brasileños.
Aunque había combustible en la estación y les explicamos que estábamos de reserva, no nos llenaron el tanque.
Dijeron que era una norma de YPF, pero fue la primera emisora ​​con la que tuvimos un problema, después de varias semanas viajando por el país.
Turistas: ¡huid!

reviewReply.comment:
Estimada Ana. Las estaciones de frontera tienen una disposición de vender a patente extrajera solo productos INFINIA y a valor diferencial, es decir mayor. Al momento de ir a la estación usted no había INFINIA por tal motivo no se pudo realizar la venta. 

Espero sepa comprender que dicha regulación es de YPF y para su cumplimiento. 

Espero después de esta aclaración sepa entender lo sucedió.

Que tenga buen fin de semana
